title: Diadia Health: AI Precision Medicine
summary: Built the marketing function from zero for an AI precision medicine platform serving functional medicine clinicians and HRT practitioners.
challenge: Strong clinical product, PhD CEO with 20 years at Google and Reddit, and a series of clinical partnerships forming — but no marketing operation existed. The CEO was closing partnerships through her personal network, creating content herself, and managing agency relationships ad hoc. No channel strategy, no outbound system, no event presence, and no way to scale beyond founder-led sales.
work: Built the entire marketing operation from zero — channel strategy, content matrix, outbound systems
Researched, ranked, and pitched 100 podcasts across 12 categories with personalised pitches per show
Set up and ran LinkedIn Sales Navigator campaigns across two executive accounts targeting clinic owners and medical directors
Managed PMWC 2026 conference end-to-end (Booth B516 in Santa Clara) including shipping, setup, and the 250-person attendee database
Coordinated the agency (MicDrop) running paid media and content — held them accountable to deliverables
Built a 115+ clinic database for outbound across HRT franchises, functional medicine, and biohacking practices
results: First structured marketing operation in the company's history
100-podcast outreach programme live with personalised pitches delivered
PMWC conference generated active pipeline conversations
LinkedIn outbound running across two accounts with 30–40% connection acceptance
CEO time freed from marketing coordination — moved from doing everything to weekly review
